⃣ “Honoring tradition, excelling in innovation” — after seven years, Girard-Perregaux proudly presents the Laureato series with a true tourbillon watch!

⃣ Power reserve: [specify hours]

⃣ Strap: imported Italian calf leather  

MTF craftsmanship. Welcome to appreciate this exceptional timepiece!

(Fully upgraded diamond-inlaid version now available)  
Girard-Perregaux Laureato Chronograph, stainless steel case, diameter mm, thickness mm. Sapphire crystal, Clous de Paris dial, baton hands. Equipped with original Japanese 🇯🇵 automatic movement, power reserve hours. Stainless steel/leather strap with stainless steel three-spoke clasp. Water resistant to meters. Diamond inlays precisely match authentic groove settings. Case finishing improved over standard version. Original steel bracelet mold, fully upgraded with head, middle, and tail links treated identically. Ceramic center links with dual-spring folding clasp for smooth, silky operation—one link equals ten clasps in convenience. Swiss 🇨🇭 sapphire crystal, elegant and simple to wear. Premium quality by AD.
